properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: People say the time has not come For the Lord's house to be build Is it time to dwell on your ceiled houses While my house lie waste Greater than Solomon's temple Greater than Solomon is here We are His habitations From dust to stars will be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He said go up to the mountain And bring wood to build my house I'll take pleasure in it, I will be glorified So I will climb the seven steps Stature of the perfect man Till the capstone comes down And takes me up from here Change to my theophany, in all eternity From glory to glory, from earthly to heavenly

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And yet once it is a little while And I will shake the heavens The earth the sea and the dry lands Nations and denominations So take good courage and be strong He said time will be no more I will fill this house with glory Thus saith the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The glory of this latter house Shall be greater than the former In his place will I gave peace Shalom, shalom, it is the rising of the sun Awake arise and shine It's grand homecoming time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is my prayer, my primordial cry I want more of you, no matter the price Total separation Lord, a true eagle nazarite Give me faith and virtue Lord So in your image I stand

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Knowledge and temperance Lord So in your image I stand Godliness and patience Lord So in your image I stand Give me brotherly kindness Lord So in your image I stand

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Give me all your love Lord So in your image I stand Give me all your love Lord So in your image I stand Give me my mountain Lord Now I know who I am
